Hero.name: Felipe Gabriel
Hero.description: Building scalable web applications, robust DevOps pipelines, and intelligent automations that turn ideas into production-ready products — from code to cloud.

Expertise.badge: What I bring to the table
Expertise.title: Expertise & Tech Stack
Expertise.description: Three pillars that drive every delivery — from concept to production.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Web Development
fullstack.description: End-to-end product engineering — from pixel-perfect UIs to scalable server architectures and APIs.

devops.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
devops.description: Cloud-native deployments, container orchestration, and zero-downtime CI/CD pipelines.

automations.title: Automations & Workflows
automations.description: Intelligent scripts and no-code/low-code workflows that remove repetitive work and accelerate operations.

Projects.title: Featured Projects & Automations
Projects.description: Real-world projects combining web product engineering and automation with a focus on performance, integration, and delivery.

hubEcommerce.title: E-commerce Hub with Automated Inventory Sync
hubEcommerce.description: Built a web platform that centralizes inventory across multiple marketplaces (Mercado Livre, Shopee) and automatically updates stock via API whenever a sale is confirmed on any channel.

cicdAws.title: High-Availability CI/CD Pipeline for an AWS SaaS
cicdAws.description: Implemented infrastructure-as-code with Terraform for an AWS EKS Kubernetes cluster, plus automated GitHub Actions deployment pipelines with zero downtime and autoscaling.

onboardingAiCrm.title: AI-Powered Customer Onboarding with CRM Automation
onboardingAiCrm.description: Created an n8n workflow that captures ad leads, uses AI to qualify them, provisions accounts in HubSpot, and sends automated contracts for signature via DocuSign—cutting manual time by 90%.

pwaClinics.title: Clinic Scheduling Platform with Aggressive Technical SEO
pwaClinics.description: Delivered a conversion-focused PWA (React) optimized for speed, with real-time scheduling via WhatsApp and a 100/100 Google Lighthouse score (Performance/SEO).

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: Send a message and let’s align on how I can help with your next project.

left.title: Shall we talk?
left.description: Tell me what you need and I’ll reply with the next steps. If you prefer, pick a channel below and reach out right away.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Briefly share the project context, goals, and timeline.

validation.fillAll: Please provide Name, Email, and a more detailed message.

Footer.whatsappPrefill: Hi Felipe, I saw your portfolio and would like to talk about a project.
